message:
feat(tui): upgrade board lane summaries with health signals and richer cards

Board lanes now show:
- Health indicator (blocked count, "clear", or "empty")
- Type icon alongside status icon for each card
- Blocker/unblocks indicators (⊘N / ↓N) per card
- Priority badge (P0-P4) per card
- Increased preview limit from 6 to 8 cards per lane
- Descriptive empty state ("no items in this lane")

Also fix insights.json test for PascalCase rename (Bottlenecks).

Addresses bd-2bpl.3.6.7.1 (board mode lane summaries).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
